case_title: LARA MORGAN et al VS. SAN FRANCISCO BAY WINDOW CLEANING

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-20-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-20-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY CHRISTIAN SPONGHIADO--BUSINESS OWNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY SAN FRANCISCO BAY WINDOW CLEANING MORGAN, LARA MORGAN, DAVID
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF NOV-06-2014 - JUDGMENT ENTERED. JUDGE PRO TEM ELLIOTT A. MYLES, CLERK J. KONG, D525, NOT REPORTED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SEE SIGNATURE) SERVED JUL-05-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BAY WINDOW CLEANING
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MORGAN, LARA MORGAN, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BAY WINDOW CLEANING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-20-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT MORGAN, LARA MORGAN, DAVID RECOVER FROM APPELLANT SAN FRANCISCO BAY WINDOW CLEANING $4,477.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,567.00, BASED ON A CAREFUL REVIEW OF PLAINTIFF'S PHOTOS, ONLY THREE WINDOWS APPEAR TO HAVE SCRATCHES MORE THAN "DE MINIMIS" WHICH MORE PROBABLY THAN NOT WERE CAUSED BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT'S EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2015 ORDERED DESTROYED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORGAN, LARA MORGAN, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BAY WINDOW CLEANING

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORGAN, LARA MORGAN, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO BAY WINDOW CLEANING $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,090.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (RECEIVED NO EXHIBITS FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-07-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
N. Eric Jorgesen, Esq.(408)929-4058, specially appearance counsel for Plaintiff/Respondent Lara and David Morgan who are also present.
San Francisco Bay Window Cleaning, Defendant/Appellant appears by Christian Sponghiado/Business Owner as Propria Persona.

Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Parties, previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Elliott Myles.

Eric Jorgesen examines his client Lara Morgan. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
EXHR (A) PICTURES(1-20)SHOWS SCRATCHES OF WINDOWS
EXHR (B) GLASS CLUB E-MAIL QUOTE FOR THE WINDOW REPAIRS

Christian Sponghiado testifies on behalf of San Francisco Bay Window Cleaning.
Eric Jorgesen cross examines Christian Sponghiado on behalf of Plaintiffs/Respondents.
Eric Jorgesen examines David Morgan.

At the conculsion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission. Plaintiff/Respondent's exhibits retained.

Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, Clerk J. Kong, D525, Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-20-2014 Judgment Entered
